content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: Normal volatility (20-day XU100 vol 37.3%) with broad participation; breadth 7/8 sectors positive. Risk appetite favors cyclicals and rate-sensitive names.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Banking & Finance and Energy & Chemicals are leading; Banking: ABOVE TREND with HALKB and VAKBN outperformance. Construction & REIT is also running ABOVE TREND on TKFEN and ALARK strength.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Holding & Investment is lagging and BELOW TREND; SAHOL, KCHOL and DOHOL are weak. Transportation is the weakest among positive sectors and largely BELOW TREND (PGSUS).

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
HALKB (1W: +12.16% | 1M: +29.44%) ABOVE TREND; TRMET (1W: +10.19% | 1M: +2.50%) ABOVE TREND; HEKTS (1W: +9.75% | 1M: +29.88%) ABOVE TREND; TRALT (1W: +8.18% | 1M: +19.12%) ABOVE TREND; TKFEN (1W: +6.89% | 1M: +7.96%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
PGSUS (1W: -0.06% | 1M: -4.97%) BELOW TREND; KCHOL (1W: -0.26% | 1M: -4.46%) BELOW TREND; ULKER (1W: -0.35% | 1M: -8.34%) BELOW TREND; SASA (1W: -0.38% | 1M: -15.71%) BELOW TREND; VESTL (1W: -0.61% | 1M: -4.59%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Top 1W movers: HALKB (1W: +12.16% | 1M: +29.44%) ABOVE TREND, TRMET (1W: +10.19% | 1M: +2.50%) ABOVE TREND, HEKTS (1W: +9.75% | 1M: +29.88%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +8.18% | 1M: +19.12%) ABOVE TREND, FROTO (1W: +5.70% | 1M: -7.34%) RECOVERY.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking ABOVE TREND: HALKB (1W: +12.16% | 1M: +29.44%) ABOVE TREND and VAKBN (1W: +5.25% | 1M: +6.29%) ABOVE TREND lead; major banks AKBNK (1W: +1.33% | 1M: -8.21%) RECOVERY, GARAN (1W: +2.44% | 1M: -2.85%) RECOVERY and ISCTR (1W: +1.90% | 1M: -4.90%) RECOVERY show short-term bounce but mixed 1M confirmation.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy Industry and Construction mixed but constructive: EREGL (1W: +4.26% | 1M: +14.04%) ABOVE TREND and ALARK (1W: +4.53% | 1M: +7.49%) ABOVE TREND are strong, TOASO (1W: +1.01% | 1M: +4.55%) ABOVE TREND; ENKAI (1W: -4.58% | 1M: -7.25%) BELOW TREND remains a caution.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy showing rotation: HEKTS (1W: +9.75% | 1M: +29.88%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +8.18% | 1M: +19.12%) ABOVE TREND and TRMET (1W: +10.19% | 1M: +2.50%) ABOVE TREND lead while SASA (1W: -0.38% | 1M: -15.71%) BELOW TREND and TUPRS (1W: +0.72% | 1M: -12.21%) RECOVERY lag on mixed fundamentals.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Tilt towards cyclicals: overweight Banking & Finance, select Heavy Industry and Construction names showing ABOVE TREND; add Energy exposures to capture rotation but trim Holding & Investment positions. Keep liquidity for volatility spikes and maintain defensive small caps exposure minimal.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
HALKB (1W: +12.16% | 1M: +29.44%) ABOVE TREND for momentum continuation, HEKTS (1W: +9.75% | 1M: +29.88%) ABOVE TREND for earnings/flows, EREGL (1W: +4.26% | 1M: +14.04%) ABOVE TREND on steel demand, TKFEN (1W: +6.89% | 1M: +7.96%) ABOVE TREND for order flow signals.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Banking & Finance for rate and earnings cues, Energy & Chemicals for commodity-related moves and profit-taking, Construction & REIT for sentiment and project-news driven re-rates.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 short-term support at the 20-day moving average and resistance at recent highs (watch volume on breakouts); catalysts: CBRT comments, Q2 bank updates, global risk-on/off flows and commodity price moves (oil, base metals).

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON market with normal volatility and broad sector participation; cyclicals lead and banks are the focal point for near-term gains. Opportunities in select Energy, Heavy Industry and Construction names; risks include any sudden rise in volatility, weak earnings from holding names and macro headlines.
